markdownRemark.html: Food affects mood immediately through taste pleasure and gradually through nutrition. That morning coffee lifts spirits. Comfort food soothes stress. A beautiful meal elevates an ordinary day into something special.

frontmatter.title: Good food equals good mood
frontmatter.excerpt: The connection between what we eat and how we feel runs deeper than you think.
frontmatter.author: joseph-crawford

authorsJson.name: Joseph Crawford
authorsJson.bio: A tech enthusiast with a passion for building scalable web applications.

frontmatter.title: The world is a book, and those who don't travel read only one page
Cooking is like love—it should be entered into with abandon
